pages.text:
REQUEST FOR QUOTATION (RFQ)
                             Supply Chain Procurement Document — Sample Filled Example

 RFQ Number                  RFQ-2026-0142                                                 Date Issued       19/07/2026
 Buyer / Company             Meridian Auto Components Ltd.                                 Response Due      02/08/2026
 Buyer Contact               Anjali Rao, Procurement Manager,                              Currency          INR
                             anjali.rao@meridianauto.in, +91 98765 43210
 Delivery Location           Plot 14, Sector 8 Industrial Area, Pune 411018                Validity Req.     90 days
                             (Incoterm: DAP)
 Supplier / Manufacturer     Vantage Steel & Alloys Pvt. Ltd., MIDC Chakan,                Supplier          Rohit
                             Pune, Maharashtra                                             Contact           Deshmukh

1. Purpose
Meridian Auto Components Ltd. ("Buyer") invites Vantage Steel & Alloys Pvt. Ltd. ("Supplier") to submit a firm quotation for
the supply of the goods described in this Request for Quotation ("RFQ"). This document is not a purchase order and does not
obligate the Buyer to award any contract.

2. Scope of Supply
The Supplier shall quote for the following items, meeting the specifications, quantities, and delivery requirements stated below.
  Item   Description / Specification             Qty     UoM    Unit Price                  Total Price      Lead Time
   #                                                              (INR)                        (INR)
   1     Cold-rolled steel bracket, Grade IS    5,000    pcs            42.00               2,10,000          4 weeks
         2062, per drawing DWG-4471-A
   2     Deep groove ball bearing 6205-         2,500    pcs           185.00               4,62,500          3 weeks
         2RS, SKF-equivalent
   3     Hex socket head cap screw              20,00    pcs             6.50               1,30,000          2 weeks
         M8x25, Class 10.9, zinc plated           0
   4     Aluminium extrusion profile            1,200    pcs           310.00               3,72,000          5 weeks
         40x40 T-slot, 6063-T5, 2m length
Technical drawings and datasheets are attached as Annex A (drawing references cited above).

3. Technical Requirements & Quality Standards
  •     Materials/components must conform to specification: IS 2062 (steel), ISO 15 (bearings), ISO 4762 (fasteners)
  •     Supplier must provide Certificate of Conformance / Material Test Certificate with each shipment
  •     Applicable quality system requirement: ISO 9001:2015
  •     Samples must be submitted within 10 days of RFQ response for approval

4. Commercial Terms Requested
  1.    Unit price and total price per line item in INR, DAP Pune
  2.    Payment terms offered: Net 45 from date of delivery
  3.    Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) and price breaks at higher volumes, if any
  4.    Lead time from Purchase Order date to delivery, per line item (as quoted above)
pages.md:
# REQUEST FOR QUOTATION (RFQ)

# Supply Chain Procurement Document — Sample Filled Example

RFQ Number: RFQ-2026-0142

Date Issued: 19/07/2026

Buyer / Company: Meridian Auto Components Ltd.

Response Due: 02/08/2026

Buyer Contact: Anjali Rao, Procurement Manager

Email: anjali.rao@meridianauto.in

Phone: +91 98765 43210

Delivery Location: Plot 14, Sector 8 Industrial Area, Pune 411018

Validity Req.: 90 days

(Incoterm: DAP)

Supplier / Manufacturer: Vantage Steel & Alloys Pvt. Ltd., MIDC Chakan, Pune, Maharashtra

Supplier Contact: Rohit Deshmukh

# 1. Purpose

Meridian Auto Components Ltd. ("Buyer") invites Vantage Steel & Alloys Pvt. Ltd. ("Supplier") to submit a firm quotation for the supply of the goods described in this Request for Quotation ("RFQ"). This document is not a purchase order and does not obligate the Buyer to award any contract.

# 2. Scope of Supply

The Supplier shall quote for the following items, meeting the specifications, quantities, and delivery requirements stated below.

| Item # | Description / Specification                                      | Qty   | UoM | Unit Price (INR) | Total Price (INR) | Lead Time |
| ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ----- | --- | ---------------- | ----------------- | --------- |
| 1      | Cold-rolled steel bracket, Grade IS 2062, per drawing DWG-4471-A | 5,000 | pcs | 42.00            | 2,10,000          | 4 weeks   |
| 2      | Deep groove ball bearing 6205-2RS, SKF-equivalent                | 2,500 | pcs | 185.00           | 4,62,500          | 3 weeks   |
| 3      | Hex socket head cap screw M8x25, Class 10.9, zinc plated         | 2,000 | pcs | 6.50             | 1,30,000          | 2 weeks   |
| 4      | Aluminium extrusion profile 40x40 T-slot, 6063-T5, 2m length     | 1,200 | pcs | 310.00           | 3,72,000          | 5 weeks   |

Technical drawings and datasheets are attached as Annex A (drawing references cited above).

# 3. Technical Requirements & Quality Standards

- Materials/components must conform to specification: IS 2062 (steel), ISO 15 (bearings), ISO 4762 (fasteners)
- Supplier must provide Certificate of Conformance / Material Test Certificate with each shipment
- Applicable quality system requirement: ISO 9001:2015
- Samples must be submitted within 10 days of RFQ response for approval

# 4. Commercial Terms Requested

1. Unit price and total price per line item in INR, DAP Pune
2. Payment terms offered: Net 45 from date of delivery
3. Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ) and price breaks at higher volumes, if any
4. Lead time from Purchase Order date to delivery, per line item (as quoted above)

pages.pageHeaderMarkdown:
# REQUEST FOR QUOTATION (RFQ)

# Supply Chain Procurement Document — Sample Filled Example

pages.text:
5.    Freight, insurance, duties, and any additional costs itemized separately
 6.    Quotation validity period: minimum 90 days from submission
 7.    Warranty period: minimum 12 months from delivery

5. Submission Instructions
 •     Quotations must be submitted via email to procurement@meridianauto.in no later than 02/08/2026, 17:00 IST
 •     Late submissions will not be considered
 •     Questions must be submitted in writing by 26/07/2026; answers will be shared with all bidders
 •     Supplier must confirm acceptance of the Terms & Conditions in Section 7 when submitting a response

6. Evaluation Criteria
Quotations will be evaluated on a combination of the following factors (Buyer reserves the right to weight these at its
discretion):
 •     Total landed cost (price, freight, duties)
 •     Lead time and delivery reliability
 •     Technical compliance with specifications
 •     Quality certifications and past performance / references
 •     Payment terms and financial stability
 •     Supplier capacity and scalability

7. Terms & Conditions
7.1 No Obligation
This RFQ is issued solely to solicit pricing information. It does not constitute an offer, and the Buyer is under no obligation to
award a purchase order to any Supplier responding to this RFQ.
7.2 Confidentiality
All information contained in this RFQ, and any information exchanged during the RFQ process, is confidential and shall not be
disclosed to third parties without prior written consent of the Buyer.
7.3 Costs of Response
The Supplier shall bear all costs associated with preparing and submitting a response to this RFQ. The Buyer shall not be liable
for any such costs.
7.4 Accuracy of Information
The Supplier warrants that all information, pricing, and representations provided in its quotation are true, accurate, and
complete to the best of its knowledge.
7.5 Governing Law
This RFQ and any resulting purchase order shall be governed by the laws of India, with courts in Pune, Maharashtra having
exclusive jurisdiction.
7.6 Award & Contract Formation
A binding contract shall come into existence only upon the Buyer's issuance of a formal Purchase Order or execution of a
definitive supply agreement referencing this RFQ and the Supplier's accepted quotation.
pages.md:
# 5. Submission Instructions

- Quotations must be submitted via email to procurement@meridianauto.in no later than 02/08/2026, 17:00 IST
- Late submissions will not be considered
- Questions must be submitted in writing by 26/07/2026; answers will be shared with all bidders
- Supplier must confirm acceptance of the Terms & Conditions in Section 7 when submitting a response

# 6. Evaluation Criteria

Quotations will be evaluated on a combination of the following factors (Buyer reserves the right to weight these at its discretion):

- Total landed cost (price, freight, duties)
- Lead time and delivery reliability
- Technical compliance with specifications
- Quality certifications and past performance / references
- Payment terms and financial stability
- Supplier capacity and scalability

# 7. Terms & Conditions

# 7.1 No Obligation

This RFQ is issued solely to solicit pricing information. It does not constitute an offer, and the Buyer is under no obligation to award a purchase order to any Supplier responding to this RFQ.

# 7.2 Confidentiality

All information contained in this RFQ, and any information exchanged during the RFQ process, is confidential and shall not be disclosed to third parties without prior written consent of the Buyer.

# 7.3 Costs of Response

The Supplier shall bear all costs associated with preparing and submitting a response to this RFQ. The Buyer shall not be liable for any such costs.

# 7.4 Accuracy of Information

The Supplier warrants that all information, pricing, and representations provided in its quotation are true, accurate, and complete to the best of its knowledge.

# 7.5 Governing Law

This RFQ and any resulting purchase order shall be governed by the laws of India, with courts in Pune, Maharashtra having exclusive jurisdiction.

# 7.6 Award & Contract Formation

A binding contract shall come into existence only upon the Buyer's issuance of a formal Purchase Order or execution of a definitive supply agreement referencing this RFQ and the Supplier's accepted quotation.
